demographics.living_situation: lives at home with spouse in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I'm up ten times a night just straining to pass a few drops, and it feels like my bladder is never empty. It's been getting a lot worse over the last three days and I'm exhausted.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The straining and getting up all night has become unbearable over the last three days and I'm scared I'm going to end up completely unable to go.

symptom_narrative.onset: has been creeping up over months but got a lot worse over the last three days
symptom_narrative.duration: months, with an acute worsening over the past 72 hours
symptom_narrative.character: I have to wait and strain to get going, the stream is weak and keeps stopping and starting, and afterwards it dribbles and still feels like there's more left
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's been — I feel like I'm never emptying and I'm shattered from no sleep
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: lower belly feels full and heavy
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst at night — up eight to ten times, and a sudden desperate urge sometimes I can't hold
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it's just been getting worse on its own over the last few days
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: sometimes a sudden urgent need where I nearly don't make it to the toilet in time
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had a slow weak stream and getting up at night for a while, but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm completely wiped out from the broken sleep and I'm worried about tripping on the way to the bathroom in the dark

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've been told my waterworks are slow because of my prostate, but I've never had it properly looked into

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an over-the-counter cold and flu tablet I started taking a few days ago for a blocked nose

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse, who is present for the call; there are rugs between the bedroom and bathroom that he keeps nearly tripping on when he rushes at night

objective_data_offered.value: he looks completely worn out and keeps shifting because he's uncomfortable in his lower belly
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's visual impression over video, not a clinical examination

objective_data_offered.value: about 92 kilos on our bathroom scales
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported from home scales, not clinically measured
